subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! By My life, O thou who hast kindled the fire of the love of God in the hearts of the noble ones among the righteous! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله لعمری یا ایها المستوقد نار محبه الله فی قلب الاحرار من الابرار
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
